name: 01 Your Roommate
description:
Caught humping your roommate’s pillow, thinking he was gone for the night due to a miscommunication.

okay so, I guess I was roleplaying with this other bot, and I've been REALLY fixated on forcemasc tumblr since I’m a trans guy myself... then I got an idea to make a bot on it? so, here we are...

UPDATE: I have made a second message for cis men/AMAB's? crazy of me, i know!! but hey, if you are a cis/AMAB user, and it claims you have AFAB anatomy, do put in that chat memory that you have AMAB anatomy

Side note: rereading my first bot on smut writing, wow. i'm just thinking, "did I really type that?" not in a bad way, i'm just a shy person when it comes to expressing my sexuality lmao. also the "You came into realization (and onto his pillow)" line?? like bro I was fucking cooking honestly.

1. Alt Bot (For Trans Men)
